statusLine.command: input=$(cat); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); dir_name=$(basename "$cwd"); cd "$cwd" 2>/dev/null && branch=$(git -c advice.detachedHead=false -c core.useBuiltinFSMonitor=false rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$branch" ]; then printf '\033[36m%s\033[0m \033[90mon\033[0m \033[35m%s\033[0m \033[90m|\033[0m \033[34m%s\033[0m' "$dir_name" "$branch" "$model"; else printf '\033[36m%s\033[0m \033[90m|\033[0m \033[34m%s\033[0m' "$dir_name" "$model"; fi
